Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Personal best update:
- Records weekly Lodestone seal results after the Monday publish window.
- Shows the active character's best recorded weekly GC Seals and Ravana rank.
